# Proven way to improve code quality generated by Claude Code

## AI Summary
The blog post explains a proven method to enhance the code quality produced by Claude Code by utilizing the /simplify command effectively. It highlights the practical benefits of this approach and guides readers on extracting cleaner, more efficient code. This technique is valuable for developers aiming to improve their workflow when working with AI-generated code.
